name: health-mate
description: Health-Mate is a bilingual Chinese/English OpenClaw health-management skill for LLM-assisted diet, hydration, exercise, symptom, and weight tracking. It parses strict memory files from MEMORY_DIR, generates localized daily and weekly PDF reports, and can optionally deliver them through DingTalk, Feishu, or Telegram.
author: tankeito

env.MEMORY_DIR: Required. The OpenClaw memory directory that stores daily markdown health logs.
env.TAVILY_API_KEY: Optional. Tavily API key for recipe and exercise research used in next-day suggestions.
env.DINGTALK_WEBHOOK: Optional. DingTalk bot webhook for outbound report delivery.
env.FEISHU_WEBHOOK: Optional. Feishu bot webhook for outbound report delivery.
env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: Optional. Telegram bot token for outbound report delivery.
env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: Optional. Telegram chat ID for outbound report delivery.
env.REPORT_WEB_DIR: Optional. Local web directory where generated PDFs should be copied.
env.REPORT_BASE_URL: Optional. Public base URL used to build downloadable PDF links.

commands.description: Generate the localized daily Health-Mate report.
Generate the localized weekly Health-Mate review.

features: Bilingual Chinese/English parsing, prompts, and report generation
Strict memory-write protocol for reliable markdown parsing
Localized daily and weekly PDF reports with charts and LLM-generated commentary
Optional push delivery through DingTalk, Feishu, and Telegram
